title: erigeron adscendens
intro: Erigeron adscendens, also known as the leafy fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that grows in moist areas and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The leafy fleabane offers various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Erigeron adscendens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
